scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,client,server -c magenta,blue,green "pnpm --filter @os-drafter/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @os-drafter/client dev" "pnpm --filter @os-drafter/server dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @os-drafter/shared build && pnpm --filter @os-drafter/client build && pnpm --filter @os-drafter/server build
